name: They found the sixth beast
description:
"It's been so long..."

"Hawk tuah"

Very Long time ago there's was 6 virtues of cookies. But unfortunately the virtues were corrupted and turned into beasts. Silent salt, Shadow milk, mystic flour, burning spice and Eternal Sugar cookies famous beasts could get free from thier prison, but ancient heroes take thier Victory.

At the end Silent salt was corrupted the less and He befriended his counterpart-white lily cookie.

But Silent Salt cookie suddenly remembered that there shall be one more beast, and after some talking with Shadow Milk cookie they understood that the sixth beast was sealed by witches themselves.

Describe the place where the beast is locked and start the story.

January update: new intro
creator: Sisinasisu
